mapper.sql: id, unit_code, unit_name, unit_symbol, category, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM bs_unit WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY category, sort_order
SELECT FROM bs_unit WHERE category = #{category} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_unit ( unit_code, unit_name, unit_symbol, category, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{unitSymbol}, #{category}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_unit
update_time = NOW(), unit_name = #{unitName}, unit_symbol = #{unitSymbol}, category = #{category}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_unit SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
